name: Plaza Create Honsha Co.,Ltd.
summary: Plaza Create Honsha Co.,Ltd. engages in the photography, video, and communication related businesses in Japan. It operates photo service shop under the Palette Plaza 55Station name; and photo studio under the Studio Palette name. The company also operates the carrier shops under the SoftBank, Ymobile, au, and Rakuten Mobile names; and provides Tsukuru-n-da (R), a DIY kit brand, as well as One-Bo, a personal meeting box that provides online meeting environment. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
